subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at port, 1912-12-13
subcodes.first_line: I come from America, where I spent nine months as a traveller. I spoke at many churches and synagogues
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از امریکا میآیم نه ماه در آن ممالک مسافر بودم در اکثر کنائس و مجامع نطق کردم
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @universal peace; world unity, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @unity of thought and belief
